hero.title: Rediscover Your True Self At Serenity Villa
hero.subtitle: Awaken every sense at a secluded resort sanctuary where organic architecture blends with the harmony of ocean and mountain.

intro.label: Design philosophy
intro.title: A Beautiful Dialogue Between People And Nature
intro.desc: At Serenity Villa, the line between living space and tropical forest quietly dissolves. We follow a "Nature-Integrated" philosophy — every architectural curve follows the terrain, letting natural light and breeze drift into every corner.
intro.quote: The small reading nook was designed to let the mind wander freely with nature.

highlights.title: Moments Of Stillness
highlights.subtitle: Every experience here is designed to awaken the senses and soothe the soul.

items.title: Pure Amenities
items.desc: Locally sourced organic herbal care products, presented in handcrafted ceramics, deliver a truly restful feeling.

items.title: Quiet Sunsets
items.desc: As night falls, warm golden light meets a deep blue sky, creating a romantic and refined mood on the open terrace.

rooms.label: Services
rooms.title: Room Rates
rooms.subtitle: Choose the space that best fits your journey back to yourself.

items.name: Deluxe Garden Villa
items.desc: Natural stone bathtub, private tea terrace and a small meditation garden right at your door.

items.name: Premier Ocean Suite
items.desc: Private mini infinity pool, personal butler service and breakfast delivered to your suite.

items.name: Grand Presidential Villa
items.desc: Three separate bedrooms, a private chef on request and an on-site spa room.

amenities.label: Facilities
amenities.title: Premium Amenities
amenities.subtitle: Every detail is thoughtfully arranged to make your stay complete.

items.label: Cancellation
items.value: Free cancellation up to 3 days before arrival, 50% refund after

testimonials.title: What Our Guests Say
testimonials.subtitle: Genuine impressions from guests who stayed at Serenity Villa.

items.quote: A space that truly touches the soul. The flowing design and natural materials made me feel completely at ease.
items.name: Minh Anh

items.quote: Attentive butler service that still respected our privacy completely. Breakfast by the infinity pool was worth every cent.
items.name: Julian S.

items.quote: I found a stillness I had lost long ago. Serenity Villa isn't just a place to stay — it's a place to heal.
items.name: Thanh Hang

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Visit us or reach out for the fastest booking assistance.
